title: healthcheckendpointreturnsokstatus
description: Test the GET /api/health endpoint to verify it returns a 200 status code with {"status":"ok"} when the server and dependencies are available.

title: searchendpointreturnsmatchingresults
description: Test the GET /api/search endpoint with a valid query parameter to ensure it returns a 200 status code with an array of matching stock or ETF symbols and metadata.

title: searchendpointvalidationerrorformissingquery
description: Test the GET /api/search endpoint without the required query parameter to verify it returns a 422 validation error.

title: searchuniverseendpointreturnsfulluniverse
description: Test the GET /api/search/universe endpoint to ensure it returns a 200 status code with the full universe list for client-side autocomplete.

title: watchlistendpointreturnslivequotes
description: Test the GET /api/stocks endpoint to verify it returns a 200 status code with the demo watchlist symbols and current live market quotes including price, change, and timestamp.

title: historicalpricesendpointreturnsdataforvalidsymbol
description: Test the GET /api/stocks/{symbol}/history endpoint with a valid symbol and range parameter to ensure it returns a 200 status code with time-series OHLCV data for the requested range.

title: analysisendpointreturnsrecommendation
description: Test the POST /api/analyze endpoint with valid JSON containing symbol and range to verify it returns a 200 status code with a recommendation (BUY, HOLD, SELL), score breakdown, confidence, warnings, position size, and entry/exit guidance.

title: portfolioendpointreturnspositionsandpnl
description: Test the GET /api/portfolio endpoint to verify it returns a 200 status code with the portfolio summary including positions array and aggregated PnL.

title: createpositionendpointvalidatesinputandcreatesposition
description: Test the POST /api/portfolio/positions endpoint with valid and invalid input to verify it creates a new position with a 201 status code for valid data and returns a 422 validation error for invalid quantity.

title: deletepositionendpointremovesposition
description: Test the DELETE /api/portfolio/positions/{id} endpoint to verify it removes an existing position with a 204 status code and returns a 404 error when the position is not found.
